action.name: Action
action.description: Fast‑paced narratives filled with physical stunts, chases, and high‑energy conflict.

adventure.name: Adventure
adventure.description: Exciting journeys or quests that transport characters to unknown or exotic locales.

comedy.name: Comedy
comedy.description: Humorous stories crafted to amuse and provoke laughter.

drama.name: Drama
drama.description: Serious, character‑driven tales that explore emotional and relational complexities.

fantasy.name: Fantasy
fantasy.description: Imaginative worlds featuring magic, mythical creatures, and supernatural powers.

scienceFiction.name: Science Fiction
scienceFiction.description: Speculative works that examine futuristic technology, space travel, or alternate realities.

horror.name: Horror
horror.description: Narratives designed to frighten, unsettle, or create a sense of dread.

mystery.name: Mystery
mystery.description: Plots centered on solving a puzzle, crime, or enigmatic event.

romance.name: Romance
romance.description: Stories focused on love, relationships, and emotional intimacy.

thriller.name: Thriller
thriller.description: Tension‑filled tales that keep readers on edge with suspense and danger.

western.name: Western
western.description: Set in the American frontier, featuring cowboys, outlaws, and rugged landscapes.

historical.name: Historical
historical.description: Fiction grounded in a specific past era, emphasizing authentic period details.

biography.name: Biography
biography.description: A factual account of a person's life, achievements, and experiences.

memoir.name: Memoir
memoir.description: A personal narrative focusing on specific memories or periods in the author's life.

history.name: History
history.description: A detailed examination of past events, societies, or movements based on evidence.

science.name: Science
science.description: Explanations of natural phenomena, research findings, and scientific concepts.

selfHelp.name: Self‑Help
selfHelp.description: Guidance and strategies for personal improvement, motivation, or well‑being.

travel.name: Travel
travel.description: Descriptive accounts of places, cultures, and journeys, often with practical tips.

trueCrime.name: True Crime
trueCrime.description: Investigative storytelling about real criminal cases and their investigations.

philosophy.name: Philosophy
philosophy.description: Explorations of fundamental questions about existence, knowledge, and ethics.

essay.name: Essay
essay.description: Short, focused nonfiction pieces that argue, reflect, or inform on a specific topic.

business.name: Business
business.description: Insights into commerce, entrepreneurship, management, and market dynamics.
